overall.description: First-person perspective from a medieval fantasy video game (resembling Skyrim) showing a stationary view from a seated position at a tavern table. The scene features candlelit ambiance with food and drink on the table while an NPC walks through the background tavern area.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern dining area with bar

events.description: NPC tavern patron walks from left to right in the background behind the stone pillar

agents.ego_description: sitting stationary at the wooden table, observing the tavern interior

notable_agents.action: walking across the tavern floor from left to right behind the bar area

entered.detail: rough-hewn wooden dining table with plates of food in the immediate foreground
triple candle holder providing warm flickering illumination on the table
ornate silver plate holding a large sausage and pickle
plate containing an apple and other fruits
thick rough stone column dividing the dining area from the bar
wooden bar with bottles and mugs visible in the background
landscape painting hanging on the stone wall above a sideboard
dark green decorative tapestry hanging on the right wall
shelves holding various items against the right wall

segments.scene_description: A stationary first-person view from a seated position at a wooden table in a dimly lit medieval tavern. The foreground features a meal with sausage and fruit on silver platters, illuminated by candlelight. In the background, a stone pillar separates the dining area from a bar, while an NPC patron walks across the far side of the room. The warm artificial lighting creates a cozy atmosphere with stone walls and wooden furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a cozy, dimly lit medieval tavern. It begins with a focus on a wooden table in the foreground, where a meal of sausage and fruit on silver platters is softly illuminated by flickering candlelight. As the gaze lingers on the warm artificial lighting, the view extends past the table toward the rustic stone walls and wooden furnishings of the interior. The scene then opens up to reveal a stone pillar that separates the dining area from the bar, while an NPC patron walks steadily across the far side of the room.
